headline: Dutch Bros' CapEx Efficiency Gains Traction: Can It Boost Returns?
summary: BROS cut average new-shop CapEx to $1.3M from $1.8M, boosting returns as it targets more than 2,000 locations.

summary: Stephen Piacentini will help the coffee chain execute its ambitious renovation and development plans as part of the Back to Starbucks initiative.

headline: Starbucks Bets On Protein Oats, Energy Drinks And Store Refresh To Reignite Growth
summary: Starbucks (NasdaqGS:SBUX) has launched MUSH protein oats nationally across its retail channels. The company has introduced new Energy Refreshers and brought back key Frappuccino offerings. Hundreds of North American stores are undergoing renovations as part of a broader uplift program. Operations in Greece and Cyprus are being transferred to Alshaya Group as part of an international portfolio reshaping. For investors watching NasdaqGS:SBUX, these moves sit at the intersection of coffee,...

headline: Starbucks unveils new ‘uplifted’ store designs in Chicago with more couches, cozier coffeehouse vibes
summary: Starbucks, the world’s largest coffeehouse chain, wants you to come back to your refreshed neighborhood store, grab a couch and stay awhile. On Thursday, Starbucks unveiled one of the first Chicago stores to be “uplifted” under its “Back to Starbucks” restructuring plan, a campaign to improve performance and the in-store experience across the chain. The stand-alone store at 4155 N. Cicero Ave. ...

headline: Apple to shutter its first unionized US store in Maryland
summary: April 9 (Reuters) - Apple said on Thursday that it will shut down its retail store in Towson, Maryland, the first of its U.S. locations where retail employees successfully unionized in 2022.

raw.headline: Apple to shutter its first unionized US store in Maryland
